channel.title: Posts on Antonio Qerozi | IT Portfolio

item.title: Z640 Projects
item.description:
Z640 Home Lab Infrastructure

Status: Active | Role: SysAdmin / Network Specialist

The Hardware

  • Chassis: HP Z640 Workstation
  • OS: Ubuntu Server 22.04 LTS (Headless)
  • Connectivity: SSH via OpenSSH Server

The Implementation

  1. OS Installation: Automated PXE boot configuration for Ubuntu Server.
  2. Remote Access: Configured SSH keys for secure, passwordless terminal access.
  3. Virtualization: Deploying UTM virtual machines for isolated testing environments.

The Objective

To simulate a corporate infrastructure environment for testing security protocols and network configurations.
